rationale: Codebase-pin lens, commit 75ae9c6a. `go build ./...` and `go vet ./cmd/mindspec/...` both clean. `go test ./cmd/mindspec/... -v` PASSES (ok, 16.8s). All 6 named acceptance tests exist in panel_test.go and PASS: TestPanelCreate_StampsResolversAndCoBumpsRoundSHA (L133), TestPanelCreate_RejectsUnsafeSlugAndControlBytes (L244, subtests empty/dot/dotdot/traversal + newline-in-slug/--bead/--target all pass), TestPanelVerify_MatchesGateAndWritesNothing (L296), TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision (L342), TestPanelTally_AggregatesConcreteChangesRequired (L427), TestPanelVerbs_DecisionIsPanelGateDecision (L462, 13 subtests). Every referenced symbol is real with the right shape: revParseForPanelFn seam (panel.go:36 var func(root,ref)(string,error)), tallyExitAction (panel.go:520), validatePanelSlug/rejectControlBytes (panel.go:226/249), panel.Create (create.go:118), panel.PanelGateDecision (gate.go:131), panel.ResolveGateFacts (gate.go:349), cfg.PanelExpectedReviewers/PanelApproveThresholdExpr (config.go:428/444), workspace.DetectLayout/SpecDir (workspace.go:237/406). Leaf invariant holds: `go list -deps ./internal/panel | grep internal/config` is empty. All decision paths route through panel.PanelGateDecision (panel.go:341/451); no second matrix. redact.go registers panel/verify/tally (drift-guard). Diff is exactly the 5 stated files, +1175. The 2 known failures are outside cmd/mindspec (internal/instruct z4ps confirmed FAIL; internal/harness timeout); cmd/mindspec package is fully green.
findings: go build ./... clean; go vet ./cmd/mindspec/... clean.

All 6 named acceptance tests present and passing, including the exhaustive RejectsUnsafeSlugAndControlBytes cases (empty/./../traversal + control-byte in slug/--bead/--target) and the 13-case DecisionIsPanelGateDecision single-home pin.

All named symbols/seams resolve to real declarations with expected signatures (revParseForPanelFn, tallyExitAction, panel.Create, panel.PanelGateDecision, cfg.PanelExpectedReviewers/PanelApproveThresholdExpr, workspace.DetectLayout/SpecDir).
Leaf invariant verified: internal/panel has no dependency on internal/config (grep empty).
Pre-existing failures confirmed outside scope: internal/instruct TestRun_IdleNoBeads FAIL (z4ps), internal/harness timeout; neither is in cmd/mindspec.
